description: Composition Blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, three quarter sleeves with single button cuffs, full buttoned placket, branding appliqué d above the left hem and a curved hem Fit arrow Nancy Fit Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from Arrow, with its crush-worthy hue is designed with an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt, closed toe pumps and a richly coloured scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
